_comment: Set these paths after cloning — they point at YOUR local source workspace (never commit real paths). knowledgeBaseDir must point at analysis/<source-repo-name>/knowledge-base in your project workspace for a real run; empty falls back to a local gitignored knowledge-base/ (smoke tests only).
_brdModules_comment: Module names to generate BRD scaffolds for (run.js step 3). Empty = all modules found in the knowledge base.
